title: MTDSim simulation event
description: Shared contract between the simulator and the replay visualiser. One object per event; event logs are newline-delimited JSON (.jsonl) with one event per line.

schema_version.description: Event-log schema version. Loaders must fail fast on unknown versions.

host_id.description: Target / compromised host id; nullable for global events.

phase.description: MTDSim attacker phase. See src/mtdsim/attacker/profile_generator.py PHASES.

technique_id.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique id sampled from a subgraph profile. Null for global / non-attacker events.

tactic.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactic slug (e.g. 'credential-access'). Reserved for future use; currently null.

meta.description: Free-form per-event-type payload. See docs/event_log.md for the per-type field list.
